title: Uiopik Aquatic Adventure
description:
A Minecraft Ocean Exploration Modpack.
Inspired by Subnautica and other Ocean survival Games.
body:
Ever wanted to dive into the unexplored ocean? No? Too bad.
This modpack was made for me and my friends, because we love the ocean and all the creepy, beautiful, mysterious stuff that comes with it. Inspired by games like Subnautica, Raft, Sea of Thieves, and every other thalassophobia-inducing Games out there, this pack turns Minecraft into a deep-sea expedition full of wonder, danger, and adventure.

Explore sunken ruins. Build Pirate Bases on Lone Islands. Survive whatever lurks below.
Welcome to Uiopik’s Aquatic Adventure.

Disclaimer:

None of the mods are mine, all credit goes to the original mod creators.
If you have questions, issues, or suggestions about the modpack, feel free to contact me on Discord: uiopik
